lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, preloaded for this ship.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Imperial Courier ship page — manufacturer specs, feature overview, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Ship slot layout, module variants, and engineering blueprint data.

sources.label: Inara — Imperial Courier
sources.what: Ship reference page: stat block, module slot layout, and sell locations.

sources.label: Fandom wiki
sources.what: Imperial Courier ship article: role profile, Gutamaya manufacture, rank requirement.

sources.label: YouTube — Down to Earth Astronomy
sources.what: Dedicated exploration build for the Imperial Courier: jump range, fuel scoop and optional-slot loadout on the light frame.
